steps.title: Set up the area equation
steps.content:
Use the triangle area formula with area $x^2$, base $2x+26$, and height $x-12$.
$$x^2=\frac{1}{2}(2x+26)(x-12)$$

steps.title: Clear and expand
steps.content:
Multiply by $2$ and expand the right side.
$$2x^2=(2x+26)(x-12)$$
$$2x^2=2x^2+2x-312$$

steps.title: Solve the linear result
steps.content:
Subtract $2x^2$ from both sides, then solve.
$$0=2x-312$$
$$x=156$$
The answer is 156.
